perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a title screen featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and large variety-show style text overlaying a blurred warehouse background. (2) A rapid series of shots begins, each focusing on a different product on a store shelf, including May Flower tissues, Angie's popcorn, I-Mei dried strawberries, Kirkland nuts, and various other snack foods and household items. (3) The camera pans and cuts quickly across different aisles, showing boxes of crackers, coffee beans, frozen seafood, and beverages, each with a superimposed text box detailing original prices and discounts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, upbeat background music with a fast tempo starts immediately. (2) A male voice speaks rapidly and enthusiastically in Mandarin, announcing each product name and its discounted price in synchronization with the visual cuts. (3) The audio maintains this high-energy pattern of fast-paced music and continuous narration throughout the entire video, with no significant ambient noise detected.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Multiple screens show product names such as "五月花妙用棉柔抽取式衛生紙", "Angie's 鹹甜爆米花", and specific price calculations like "原價349 -70 特價279". (2) Decorative/Effect Text: The intro features "好市多 每週特價速報" and "05/26 - 06/01" in bold, colorful variety-show style fonts to hook the viewer.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product listing with price overlays -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Only the hands of the person filming or holding products are occasionally visible; no full faces or bodies appear.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving units stacked with bulk products, refrigerated sections, and industrial lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick, informative summary of weekly sales and discounts at Costco Taiwan to encourage shopping during the specified date range.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products with price reduction information and the Costco logo.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-talking narration synchronized with rapid product price reveals.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is optimized for short-form platforms like TikTok or Reels, using high visual and auditory information density to maintain viewer engagement.
